skill-chain-multi.value: When tackling complex tasks, invoke skills in sequence: brainstorming -> search-first -> create-plan -> implementation. This ensures well-researched, approved designs before coding.

multi-agent-orchestration.value: For multi-faceted tasks, use orchestrator droid to decompose work and delegate to specialized droids (coder, researcher, code-reviewer) rather than handling everything in one session.

askuser-first.value: When requirements are ambiguous, use AskUser for focused multi-choice questions before proceeding with implementation to avoid rework.

todo-tracking.value: Always create TodoWrite items for multi-step tasks, especially when skills are involved. Update status in real-time as work progresses.

research-before-code.value: For new features or unknown codebases, use search-first skill to check existing patterns before writing new code. Reduces duplicate abstractions.

session-analysis-pattern.value: Analyze recent session logs to extract: successful tool chains, skill usage sequences, common failure points, and reusable workflow approaches. Feed insights back to optimizer.

test-pattern---we-use-the-repository-pat.value: test pattern - we use the repository pattern

personal-note---i-prefer-zsh-over-bash.value: personal note - I prefer zsh over bash

we-prefer-early-returns-in-python.value: we prefer early returns in Python
